meaning: vt.鍋氬緱杩囧垎,杩囧害,澶稿紶,鍋氫綔,浣胯繃鐏玽i.杩囩伀
examples: It is important never to overdo new exercises.
It's important to study hard, but don't overdo it.
Don't overdo it or be fake about it.
Some women tend to overdo it, because they don't tone down the rest of their makeup.
In my opinion, he will sometimes overdo a phrase, but less than he used to.
